steps.title: Write f(x) in factored form
steps.content: Because the graph passes through $(7,0)$ and $(-3,0)$, the roots are $x=7$ and $x=-3$. So $$f(x)=a(x-7)(x+3).$$

steps.title: Expand to find b in terms of a
Test integer values a > 1
steps.content:
Since $a$ is an integer with $a>1$, $a+b=-3a$ takes values $-6,-9,-12,\ldots$ Only $-6$ (when $a=2$) appears among the choices.
  • $-6$: matches $a=2$ — possible.
  • $-3$: would need $a=1$, but $a>1$ — impossible.
  • $4$: $-3a=4$ gives non-integer $a$ — impossible.
  • $5$: $-3a=5$ gives non-integer $a$ — impossible.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
